closed_world.value: Nuclear fallout shelter converted to tourist attraction
closed_world.quote: they were opening a new tourist attraction in an old nuclear fall out shelter

culprit_and_motive.value: John launches missile from fallout shelter (motive unclear)
culprit_and_motive.quote: John ask him to just kill him and get it over with

resolution.value: Military jets shoot down the launched missile
resolution.quote: Rick notified the pentagon and they had their fighter jets that were on stand by shoot it out of the sky

investigator.value: Rick Johnson, former military Lt General turned police officer
investigator.quote: Rick Johnson was Former Military and now was just a shell of what he use to be

red_herring.value: Tourist attraction cover story for nuclear fallout shelter masks true terrorist operation
red_herring.quote: He couldn't understand why in the hell someone would want to spend any amount of time in a place that had no windows

social_world.value: Military hierarchy and police department power structures - Rick's military rank versus civilian authority
social_world.quote: Rick had a rank of a Lt General because he spend 95% of his life in there

media_and_audience.value: News coverage of tourist attraction opening creates public perception that masks military threat
media_and_audience.quote: He was watching the news one night and saw that they were opening a new tourist attraction

investigator_wound.value: Rick's broken family life and military displacement - seeking redemption through dangerous mission
investigator_wound.quote: his wife had left him right after he got out of the army after telling him that they would spend the rest of their lives together

_meta.title: ebook the general himself death from the past
